productDisplayName: Nike Men Black and Green Sandals
description: Style NoteIf comfort is on your mind, these floaters from nike will transport you to heavenly bliss! Stylish, super comfy and lightweight, they will make you feel like you are walking on a bed of roses all day. Ruggedly crafted for casual wear with a tough outsole, you can team them with jeans or shorts and step out in style.Product DetailsBlack and green floaters with synthetic leather forefoot and midfoot straps and an ankle loopThe straps have triangular cut- out detailing and are fastened by velcro closuresElasticated gussets on the heel collar strap for snug FitPadded and textured footbedTPU outsole with rectangular lugsWarranty for manufacturing defects: 6 months (not valid on products with more than 20% discount)Material and CareSynthetic Wipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
